description: An email proposing specific meeting times — should detect hasSchedulingContext=true.

email.subject: Quick call next week?
email.snippet: Could we grab 30 minutes next week to catch up?
email.body:
Hey,

Hope you're doing well. Could we grab 30 minutes next week to catch up on the integration work? Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon would be great on my end.

Frank

rubric:
Good output:
- `hasSchedulingContext` is true
- The output identifies that specific times are being proposed (Tuesday/Wednesday afternoon)
- Includes some indication of duration awareness (30 minutes)

Bad output:
- `hasSchedulingContext: false` (clearly wrong — this IS scheduling)
- Misses the time proposal entirely
